news.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

news.title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.

news.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

news.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the risk of outright fraud.

news.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

news.title: 'The Daily Show' mocks Melania Trump AI speech
news.description: [USA TODAY] "The Daily Show" host Desi Lydic mocked Melania Trump's recent White House speech about artificial intelligence: "The robots are here."

news.title: CoreWeave AI Funding Goes Global With Euro Junk
news.description: [BLOOMBERG] Cloud-computing giants powering the artificial intelligence boom are tapping global debt markets to fund hundreds of billions of dollars needed for data centers, chips and other infrastructure. Junk-rated CoreWeave Inc. is now following their lead.

news.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

news.title: PM Modi Pushes States To Tap FTA Benefits, Draw Investments At Niti Aayog Meeting
news.description: [NDTV PROFIT] He urged states to focus on emerging sectors such as data centres and artificial intelligence, emphasising that AI should be viewed as an opportunity rather than a challenge.

news.title: DoorDash rolls out AI chatbot to pick your dinner, stock your fridge and book a table
news.description: [LOS ANGELES TIMES] DoorDash Inc. introduced an in-app artificial intelligence chatbot to help customers make restaurant and grocery orders, and suggested the technology could also be used to unlock new enterprise revenue streams.

news.title: Chitkara University launches digital campus on Google Cloud 4.0, emerges as one of India’s early agentic AI universities
news.description: [HINDUSTAN TIMES] The digital campus on Google Cloud 4.0 initiative will provide learners and educators with access to advanced Agentic AI training, hands-on cloud laboratories and self-paced learning pathways

news.title: Five human skills AI still can’t match - and why they could save your job
news.description: [LOS ANGELES TIMES] Many workers fear machines will supplant them as adoption of artificial intelligence accelerates

news.title: Value Roles With AI as Recent Graduates Face Hiring Challenges – NaturalNews.com
news.description: [NATURAL NEWS] Major banks are reducing intake of junior analysts and investing heavily in artificial intelligence, according to a Bloomberg report, while recent graduates confront a double challenge: navigating AI-driven hiring processes today and questioning how...

news.title: Crusoe Pushed Aside at Wyoming AI Project After Google Concerns
news.description: [BLOOMBERG] Data center upstart Crusoe is being pushed aside at an artificial intelligence campus it was developing in Wyoming after failing to lock in customers including Alphabet Inc.’s Google, according to people familiar with the situation.

news.title: Anthropic CEO calls for urgent binding AI regulations
news.description: [THEPRINT] After years of caution, CEO Dario Amodei says in essay that time for voluntary AI governance is over & the window to regulate is closing fast, compares AI impact to nuclear weapons.

news.title: Deezer Declares War On AI Music Across Spotify And Apple Music
news.description: [TIMES NOW] Deezer has introduced an AI music detector aimed at helping users identify tracks generated by artificial intelligence in their playlists. This tool connects to various streaming platforms, scanning users' libraries to determine the percentage of...
